com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Interface InputAccount.InputAccountCallback

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat
    Enclosing class:
    InputAccount

    public static interface InputAccount.InputAccountCallback
    Call back from POS Service for input account command. Note:
    V1.04.00 Add onSelectLanguage, please use InputAccount.InputAccountCallbackCompat

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onEnterCVV()
      When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input CVV.
      void onEnterExpiryDate()
      When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input expiry date.
      void onEnterZip()
      When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input zip code.
      void onInputAccountStart()
      When called, you need to show your UI to inform that it is ready to read card.
      void onProcessing(java.lang.String code, java.lang.String message)
      When called, there is some heavy job being handled.
      void onSelectEMVApp(java.util.List<java.lang.String> options)
      When called, you need to show your UI to allow select EMV App.
      void onWarnRemoveCard()
      When called, you need to show your warning message about remove card.

    • Method Detail

      • onInputAccountStart

        void onInputAccountStart()
        When called, you need to show your UI to inform that it is ready to read card. Together with InputAccount.handleInputAccount(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.CardEventListener) or InputAccount.handleInputCardNum(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)

      • onEnterExpiryDate

        void onEnterExpiryDate()
        When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input expiry date. Together with InputAccount.handleInputExpiry(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)

      • onEnterZip

        void onEnterZip()
        When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input zip code. Together with InputAccount.handleInputZip(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)

      • onEnterCVV

        void onEnterCVV()
        When called, you need to show your UI to allow use input CVV. Together with InputAccount.handleInputCVV(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)

      • onSelectEMVApp

        void onSelectEMVApp(java.util.List<java.lang.String> options)
        When called, you need to show your UI to allow select EMV App. Together with InputAccount.handleSelectEMVApp(java.lang.String, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)
        Parameters:
        options - The app list

      • onProcessing

        void onProcessing(java.lang.String code,
                  java.lang.String message)
        When called, there is some heavy job being handled. You should prompt a loading dialog. Together with InputAccount.handleProcessing(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.InputAccount.ProcessingMessageUpdateCallback, com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)
        Parameters:
        code - The code match the message. ResultConstant
        message - The message for loading.

      • onWarnRemoveCard

        void onWarnRemoveCard()
        When called, you need to show your warning message about remove card. Together with InputAccount.handleWarnRemoveCard(com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase.CurrentStepCallback)
